description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these nubuck shoes from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and an absolute comfort to the feet, they're a perfect addition to your wardrobe for those afternoons relaxing at the bar or lounge. Team this with chinos and a simple shirt for that cool, casual look. Upper Complete nubuck upper for that stylish look and comfort feel Long tongue for easy wear Rugged stitch detailing at the seams of the toe box Brand badge on lateral ankle Long collar for comfortable insertion and removal of foot Fabric footbed Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with textured patterning and a slightly upraised heel shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Use a suede brush to dust suede surface Do not store in direct sunlight
